description_long: This humanoid robot features a stylized, cartoon-like design with a predominantly white and teal color scheme. Its head is large and rounded, with two prominent teal pigtail-like appendages extending upward, and expressive black eyes set in a white face. The torso is compact and angular, with teal shoulder and hip plates, and the arms and legs are slender, segmented, and end in rounded hands and feet. The robot's joints are clearly defined, suggesting a high degree of articulation, and the overall form is sleek and friendly, evoking a youthful, approachable character. The surface appears smooth and hard, with a glossy finish that reflects light subtly. No visible clothing or accessories are present, and the robot's design is integrated and streamlined for urban interaction.
description: A stylized, cartoon-like humanoid robot with a large head, teal pigtail appendages, expressive eyes, and a sleek white and teal body with articulated limbs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the robot's large head, expressive eyes, teal pigtails, and outstretched articulated arms and legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, pigtail, and the segmented limbs with visible joints.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, pigtails, and the smooth, featureless back with articulated arms and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, pigtail, and the segmented limbs with visible joints.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended outward to the sides, legs straight and slightly apart, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the robot has integrated panels and coverings in white and teal, forming a streamlined, decorative exterior.
attribute_facial_features: Large, expressive black eyes set in a white face, with no visible mouth or nose; the face is simple and cartoon-like, conveying a friendly appearance.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs are segmented with visible hinge or rotary joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees; hands have articulated fingers, and limbs appear flexible and capable of a wide range of motion.
